DaVinci Project Server — Roadmap
================================

Version 1.x Goals
-----------------

- Improve GUI responsiveness
- Add project library export tools
- Add optional authentication layer
- Expand backup/restore options
- Improve Docker image size and build speed

Version 2.x Goals
-----------------

- Web-based configuration editor
- Multi-user access control
- Remote PostgreSQL support
- Plugin system for custom tools

Long-Term Vision
----------------

- Full standalone Resolve project management suite
- Cross-platform deployment (Linux, macOS, Windows)
- Automated cloud backup integration

End of File
-----------
